title: Iran warns U.S. of Hormuz ‘red line,’ says it will retaliate to Trump’s strike threats
summary_full: Trump warned that the U.S. will target Iranian infrastructure next week if negotiations do not resume.
summary_public: Trump warned that the U.S. will target Iranian infrastructure next week if negotiations do not resume.

IR.label: negative
